s3.storagelens.bucketsandregions.Buckets.Docs: This property contains the details of the buckets for the Amazon S3 Storage Lens configuration. This should be the bucket Amazon Resource Name(ARN). For valid values, see [Buckets ARN format here](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/API/API_control_Include.html#API_control_Include_Contents) in the *Amazon S3 API Reference*.

s3.storagelens.bucketsandregions.Regions.Docs: This property contains the details of the Regions for the S3 Storage Lens configuration.
